project_name: Miguel Torres — standalone_residential — Los Cabos, BCS
raw_message: Hola, quiero una casa de 3 recámaras con alberca en Los Cabos. Mi presupuesto es de $200,000 USD.
initial_assessment: Standalone residential project in Los Cabos, BCS — a premium coastal destination with above-average construction costs. Client requests 3-bedroom house with pool on an 800 sqm flat lot, programmed at 216 sqm total. Budget of $200K USD is explicitly stated but likely constrained for the requested scope in this location — pool and coastal premiums will require careful budget alignment. Client is budget-constrained per profile; design engagement is direct and program-specific.
